  - DOC2 (Break the Sequential Dependency of LLM Inference Using LOOKAHEAD DECODING): References Team et al., 2023, Ouyang et al., 2022, Touvron et al., 2023a, Touvron et al., 2023b, Jiang et al., 2023, OpenAI, 2023, Chen et al., 2023, Leviathan et al., 2023, Miao et al., 2023, Cai et al., 2024, Liu et al., 2023, Li et al., 2023, He et al., 2023, Yang et al., 2023, Saxena, 2023, FlashAttention (Dao, 2023).
  - DOC3 (Kangaroo: Lossless Self-Speculative Decoding via Double Early Exiting): References Vicuna-7B, Spec-Bench, LLaMA-68M, LLaMA7B, Medusa, Lookahead, multi-head attention, normalization layers.

  Stage 2 — Structure Selection and Mapping:

  - The structure should be a "mapping" with keys as the paper titles and values as lists of references and citations.
